architecture.summary: Pull-based source replacing push dispatch, new platform API endpoints, claim-one-at-a-time granularity

data_model.summary: Add claimedAt/claimedBy to ExternalScanResult, reaper for stuck RUNNING scans >15min

integration.summary: Crawl-worker source pattern, ASSIGNED_SOURCES on VM-2, WORKER_SECRET auth

rollout.summary: Feature flag SAST_PULL_MODE, phased: add pull first, remove push in follow-up

migration.summary: Enqueue sites write PENDING to DB+KV but skip dispatch when pull active, admin endpoint stays as enqueue
